case_title: COLBERT DARE VS. SOUL LOUNGE, LLC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DARE, COLBERT AS TO DEFENDANT SOUL LOUNGE, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL ROSEN--BUSINESS MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2015 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SOUL LOUNGE, LLC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,842.50 FILED BY DARE, COLBERT AS TO DEFENDANT SOUL LOUNGE, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, MAILED BY CERTIFIED MAIL TO DEFENDANT/ADDRESSED TO EAMON JAFARI RETURNED= RETURNED TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD. (GREEN CARD NOT ATTACHED)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $104.25 SERVED SEP-22-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOUL LOUNGE, LLC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF RETURN RECEIPT(GREEN CARD) RECEIVED **AFTER** JUDGMENT WITHOUT SIGNATURE, WITHOUT ENVELOPE & SC-100 AND WITHOUT DATE OF DELIVERY COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SOUL LOUNGE, LLC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DARE, COLBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUL LOUNGE, LLC. $2,442.50 PRINCIPAL, $169.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,611.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
